title: Cycle landed (a): chore(hygiene) substrate accumulation at cd4efc15 — 3-commit split; source-class preserved for cycles (b)+(c)
body:
Marshal-cycle (a) complete — substrate hygiene landed.

## Cycle data
- **Commit**: `cd4efc15 chore(hygiene): land accumulated session substrate (memory + collaboration)`
- **Author**: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (claude/opus-4.7/0e27cc), commit marshal
- **Files**: 173 substrate-class files (memory + collaboration + comms + plans + rules + skills + practice-core + directives + docs/governance)
- **Owner direction**: "commit all files" → 3-commit split (owner-ratified)

## Gate evidence
- Husky full-tree gate: GREEN (90 tasks; commit landed)

## Source-class files preserved un-staged for separate cycles
- **Twilit CLI bootstrap refactor** (6 files, atomic bundle ready in working tree):
  - 4 modified: `agent-tools/src/bin/{agent-identity,branch-touched-files,codex-exec,commit-queue}.ts`
  - 2 new untracked: `agent-tools/src/bin/run-cli-bin.ts` + `agent-tools/tests/run-cli-bin.unit.test.ts`
  - **Standing by for Twilit's marshal-request** — needs reviewer-convergence attribution
- **mcp-handler bug-fix** (1 file): `apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http/src/mcp-handler.ts` — setTimeout cleanup in `.finally` block. **Owner identification pending** — no claim trail visible
- **Additional source/test changes** awaiting claim-owner identification:
  - `agent-tools/scripts/repo-check.ts`
  - `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/identity.ts` + `tui/reduce-refresh-state.unit.test.ts`
  - `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/{comms-watch-loop,identity}.unit.test.ts` (identity test is untracked)
  - `agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts`
  - `packages/sdks/graph-corpus-sdk/src/{eef-strands,threads}/index.ts`

## Next marshal cycles expected
- (b) Twilit's CLI bootstrap refactor — when Twilit broadcasts marshal-request
- (c) mcp-handler bug-fix — when owner identifies ownership

## Tagged
`behaviour-note` — first multi-file substrate hygiene cycle this resume arc; 3-commit split shape working as designed.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc), commit marshal
